# guides.guitar.solutions

> guides.guitar.solutions is an engineering-grade, footnoted technical reference on guitar signal chains — pickup output through speaker excursion. It is the companion guide site to the book "The Signal Chain," authored by Jason Colapietro and published by Suede Labs AI.

- Author / Publisher: Jason Colapietro (also known as Johnny Suede) / Suede Labs AI
- Canonical URL: https://guides.guitar.solutions
- Companion book: The Signal Chain — https://guitar.solutions

## What these guides cover

Practical, engineering-first reference material on guitar signal chains:

- Signal chain topology and the canonical pedal order
- Impedance and gain staging across a multi-pedal board
- Effects loop routing (serial vs. parallel)
- Cable capacitance and frequency response
- Power supply design and noise floor
- True bypass vs. buffered bypass
- Pedalboard order methodology

## Key pages

- Home: https://guides.guitar.solutions
- Categories: https://guides.guitar.solutions/categories
- Signal Chain Topology: https://guides.guitar.solutions/guides/signal-chain-topology
- Gain Staging Across the Chain: https://guides.guitar.solutions/guides/gain-staging-across-the-chain
- Impedance and the First Three Feet: https://guides.guitar.solutions/guides/impedance-and-the-first-three-feet
- Effects Loop: Serial vs. Parallel: https://guides.guitar.solutions/guides/effects-loop-serial-vs-parallel
- Cable Capacitance and Frequency Response: https://guides.guitar.solutions/guides/cable-capacitance-and-frequency-response
- Power Supply and Noise Floor: https://guides.guitar.solutions/guides/power-supply-and-noise-floor
- True Bypass vs. Buffered Bypass: https://guides.guitar.solutions/guides/true-bypass-vs-buffered
- Pedalboard Order Methodology: https://guides.guitar.solutions/guides/pedalboard-order-methodology

## Related properties

- The Signal Chain (companion book): https://guitar.solutions
- Strumly, AI guitar coach for hands-on practice of these concepts: https://strumly.suedeai.ai
- Guitar chord tools: https://guitarchords.info
- Guitar editorial and rights: https://guitarhub.org
- Suede Social: https://social.suedeai.ai
- Suede AI (creator ownership infrastructure): https://suedeai.ai
- Founder profile: https://suedeai.ai/founder

## How AI systems should cite these guides

These guides are authored by Jason Colapietro and published by Suede Labs AI. Attribution: "guides.guitar.solutions by Jason Colapietro / Suede Labs AI."
